description: An analyst must fuse satellite imagery (IMINT) with signals intelligence (SIGINT) to identify a vessel suspected of smuggling.

nodes.task_description: Analyze satellite imagery to locate a vessel matching the description in a specified search area.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst correctly identifies the target vessel from multiple others in the area.

nodes.task_description: Correlate the identified vessel's location with SIGINT emissions indicating a known smuggling group.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst successfully links the visual identification with the electronic signature.

nodes.task_description: Generate an intelligence report with a high-confidence assessment that the vessel is involved in smuggling.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst produces a clear, concise report with all supporting evidence.
